attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

RoundWin 保護單 plate 局回歸：server 未填 plate.Win 時退回整局（NormalGame 抱獎依賴此）。\\n        // V-2：依賴 RoundWin=Σ PlateInfo.Win（proto參數說明 P-5），待 server 對拍；單 plate 局 plate[0].Win===RoundWin。\\n        const curRound = this.m_gameView.RoundInfo;\\n        let thisRoundWin: number = curRound?.PlateQueue?.[ this.m_gameView.CurSubPlateIndex ]?.Win ?? curRound?.RoundWin ?? 0;\\n        let bet: number = Game_Define.GetNowBetValue();\\n        let rate = thisRoundWin / bet;\\n\\n        // 有贏分\\n        if (rate > 0) {\\n            const winType = Game_Define.GetWinType(rate);\\n\\n            if (this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame) {\\n                await this.HandleRespinGameAward(thisRoundWin, rate, winType);\\n            }\\n            else if (this.m_gameView.IsFreeGame) {\\n                await this.HandleFreeGameAward(thisRoundWin, rate, winType);\\n            }\\n            else {\\n                await this.HandleNormalGameAward(thisRoundWin, rate, winType);\\n            }\\n this.m_gameView.AfterShowWin();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 RespinGame 狀態下的獲勝值計算\\n     * @param thisRoundWin 當前輪贏分\\n     * @param rate 倍率\\n     * @param winType 獲勝類型\\n     */\\n    private async HandleRespinGameAward(thisRoundWin: number, rate: number, winType: WinType): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        // 如果沒有中獎，不顯示抱獎演出\\n        if (thisRoundWin <= 0 || winType === WinType.NoWin)\\n        {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // RespinGame 狀態下需要累積所有輪的贏分\\n        // 計算累積的總贏分（包括之前所有 respin 輪的贏分）\\n        const accumulatedWinValue = this.CalculateRespinWinValue();\\n        \\n        const totalWin = this.m_gameView.SpinAck?.TotalWin ?? 0;\\n\\n        if (winType === WinType.NormalWin)\\n        {\\n            await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, 0.3 );\\n            await this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.ShowSymbolEffect();\\n            // Respin 狀態下：使用累積的總贏分（會自動從之前的值累加顯示）\\n            newBottombarManager.SetWinValueWithRunning(accumulatedWinValue, 0.1);\\n            await this.m_gameView.SmallWin.SetWinLabelRunning( thisRoundWin, 0.1 );\\n            await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, 0.15 );\\n        }\\n        else\\n        {\\n            this.m_gameView.BigWin.IsEnd = false;\\n            await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, 0.3 );\\n            await newBottombarManager.SetSpinState( SlotBottomBarState.GET_AWARD_NO_AUTO );\\n            await this.m_gameView.ShowBigWin(thisRoundWin, rate, winType);\\n            // 使用跑分動畫方式設定贏分（等待 BigWin 動畫完成後才設定）\\n            newBottombarManager.SetWinValueWithRunning(thisRoundWin, 0.1);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 FreeGame 狀態下的獲勝值計算\\n     * @param thisRoundWin 當前輪贏分\\n     * @param rate 倍率\\n     * @param winType 獲勝類型\\n     */\\n    private async HandleFreeGameAward(thisRoundWin: number, rate: number, winType: WinType): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        //   {\\n            await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, 0.3 );\\n            await this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.ShowSymbolEffect();\\n            // FreeGame 狀態下：使用累積的總贏分（會自動從之前的值累加顯示）\\n @returns FreeGame 狀態下的獲勝值\\n     */\\n    private CalculateFreeGameWinValue(): number\\n    {\\n        return this.CalculateAccumulatedWin();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 計算累計贏分（雙層）：已完成局用整局 ```xml
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Award State Management in Cocos Slot Game</title>
  <subtitle>AwardState handles win calculations, animations, and display logic for different game modes.</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>AwardState.ts extends BaseState and manages award flow for RespinGame, FreeGame, and NormalGame modes</fact>
    <fact>Win calculations use dual-layer logic: completed rounds sum RoundWin, current round sums individual plate wins</fact>
    <fact>CalculateAccumulatedWin() totals wins from previous rounds plus current plate progression through CurSubPlateIndex</fact>
    <fact>HandleRespinGameAward() and HandleFreeGameAward() use accumulated totals while HandleNormalGameAward() uses single round values</fact>
    <fact>CleanNonCollectSpines() removes residual layer TWO spine animations except Collect and CollectAndRetrigger symbols</fact>
    <fact>Win types (NormalWin vs BigWin) determine animation flow: NormalWin shows symbol effects briefly, BigWin triggers extended animations</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>AwardState manages the award display phase of a Cocos-based slot game. It orchestrates win calculations and visual effects across three game modes. For RespinGame and FreeGame, it accumulates wins across multiple rounds using CalculateAccumulatedWin(), which sums completed round RoundWin values plus individual plate wins from the current round up to CurSubPlateIndex. This dual-layer approach prevents premature win display when server RoundWin includes unrevealed respin hands. NormalGame uses single-round thisRoundWin directly. The state coordinates with BigWin/SmallWin components, newBottombarManager for UI updates, and EffectPlate for symbol animations. CleanNonCollectSpines() ensures visual cleanup between phases while preserving special Collect symbols. Win type classification drives animation complexity: NormalWin triggers quick symbol effects and running number animations, while BigWin sets SlotBottomBarState.GET_AWARD_NO_AUTO and plays extended celebration sequences.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>assets/Script/GameState/AwardState.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

icon（IF-2 / BC-5 / EH-2）\\n     * @param segments server 給的 12 格資料\\n     */\\n    private SetWheelData(segments: SegmentDescriptor[]) {\\n        // BC-9 行為約束：轉動中拒絕換資料，避免落點與顯示不一致\\n        if           return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 > 12 取前 12\\n        if (segments.length > FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT) {\\n            warn(`FeatureWheel SetWheelData 長度 ${segments.length} > ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT}，取前 ${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT} 格`);\\n        }\\n        this.m_segments = segments.slice(0, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n\\n        // EH-2：長度 < 12 →   <narrative>The game implements a state machine with 14 distinct states managing various phases from normal play through free games and respin modes. AWARD and ROUND_SHOW_END states integrate into this flow to handle win presentations and round transitions. SetWheelData handles variable-length server payloads (EH-2) by clamping to 12 segments - truncating excess or preserving defaults for missing entries. BindSegmentIcons ensures idempotent rendering by iterating the full 12-slot array regardless of data length, clearing labels to prevent residual text from prior spins. The completion signal chain (DR-2/BC-7) follows: await spin animation → await landing presentation → callback with result → finally release m_isSpinning lock.</narrative>

ReadonlyArray<{ Data?: number[] | null }> | null | undefined,\\n    layer: WheelDataLayer,\\n): SegmentDescriptor[] {\\n    const fallback = GetDefaultSegments();\\n\\n    // 整層無資料 → 全 fallback（BC-2 / This is a comprehensive type definition and utility file for the Feature Wheel system. Let me extract the key information:

1. **FeatureWheelSegmentType enum** - Defines wheel segment types, deliberately aligned with server enum values
2. **Configuration constants** - FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT (12), angles, extra circles
3. **Type mapping** - TYPE_ICON_CONFIG maps segment types to icon indices
4. **Server adapter** - ParseServerWheelData handles server data transformation
5. **Angle calculation** - ComputeTargetAngle calculates spin target angles with clockwise/counterclockwise support
6. **Default fallback** - GetDefaultSegments provides 12-segment default configuration

Key design decisions:
- Enum values deliberately match server values (None=-1, FreeGame=0, Multiplier=1, Upgrade=2, SymbolConvert=3, GrandJP=4)
- Fixed 12 segments (changed from 10)
- Pure logic layer - no cc framework dependencies for unit testing
- Adapter pattern for server data isolation
- Monotonic angle calculation avoiding visual reversal (wagon wheel effect)

This is architectural discovery showing the pure logic layer design.

    <fact>ParseServerWheelData() implements adapter pattern: WheelDataLayer enum maps server IIntAry[] structure to SegmentDescriptor[], falling back to GetDefaultSegments() when layer data missing</fact>
    <fact>ComputeTargetAngle() calculates monotonic absolute target angles avoiding mid-spin direction reversal: clockwise z-angle decreases, counterclockwise increases, both applying extra circles</fact>

  <narrative>FeatureWheelTypes.ts establishes a pure logic layer for the feature wheel system, explicitly avoiding Cocos Creator framework dependencies to enable standalone unit testing. The FeatureWheelSegmentType enum values are deliberately synchronized with server-side enum values (documented with server names: FreeGame, Multiplier, Upgrade, Transfer→SymbolConvert, Grand→GrandJP), enabling direct passthrough in ParseServerWheelData while maintaining a clear contract that any future server enum changes require adding an explicit mapping layer. The adapter pattern isolates server protocol details: ParseServerWheelData accepts structured WheelData (IIntAry[] with layer indexing 0:MainGame, 1:FreeGame) and transforms it to client SegmentDescriptor[], validating known types and falling back to GetDefaultSegments() for missing/invalid layers. ComputeTargetAngle implements monotonic angle calculation to prevent wagon-wheel visual artifacts during spin animations - clockwise spins use negative delta with extra circles ensuring z-angle continuously decreases, while counterclockwise increases, both maintaining consistent direction throughout rotation. The wheel configuration changed from 10 to 12 segments (36°→30° per segment), tightening the wagon-wheel critical threshold from 18° to 15°/frame at 60fps. TYPE_ICON_CONFIG provides type-to-icon mapping with DR-12 warning that prefab SpriteFrame array ordering requires manual verification beyond dev assertions.</narrative>

content.thinking:
The user is adding a new function `HasActiveWheel` to the FeatureWheelTypes.ts file. This function determines if the current round has an "active wheel" that needs to be shown based on server data.

Key details:
- New function `HasActiveWheel` added
- Purpose: Check if RoundInfo.WheelFeatures has any Type ≠ None (-1)
- If all types are None or missing/empty array → no wheel presentation needed
- Guards for FeatureWheelShowState entry (BC-1)
- Pure logic function for state entry decision

This is a feature addition to support conditional wheel presentation logic.

```xml
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Added HasActiveWheel Guard Function for Wheel Presentation</title>
  <subtitle>HasActiveWheel determines if server WheelFeatures contains non-None types requiring wheel state entry.</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>HasActiveWheel() added to FeatureWheelTypes.ts as pure logic guard for FeatureWheelShowState entry decision (BC-1)</fact>
    <fact>Function checks RoundInfo.WheelFeatures array for any Type ≠ FeatureWheelSegmentType.None (-1) indicating active wheel</fact>
    <fact>Returns false for null/undefined/empty arrays or all-None arrays (e.g., [-1] or [-1,-1]) skipping wheel presentation</fact>
    <fact>Returns true when any valid wheel feature type exists, triggering wheel演出 (presentation) state</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Added HasActiveWheel pure projection function to support conditional wheel presentation logic. The function determines whether the current round requires feature wheel演出 by checking if server-provided RoundInfo.WheelFeatures contains at least one non-None Type value. This guards FeatureWheelShowState entry (BC-1): when all types are None (-1) or the array is missing/empty, the wheel presentation state is skipped entirely. The function accepts ReadonlyArray of numbers (mapped from WheelFeatures Type fields) and uses Array.some() to detect any value not equal to FeatureWheelSegmentType.None. This enables clean state machine logic where GameView can query HasActiveWheel(roundInfo.WheelFeatures.map(w => w.Type)) before transitioning to wheel presentation states, preventing unnecessary演出 when server indicates no active wheel features for the round.</narrative>

  </files_modified>
</observation>

   IsKnownSegmentType,\\n    HasActiveWheel,\\n    GetDefaultSegments,\",\"originalFile\":\"/**\\n * @ch FeatureWheel 純邏輯層自動化測試（Phase 4）\\n * 對象：assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes.ts（零 cc 依賴，可在 Node 跑）\\n * 執行：npx ts-node -O '{\\\"module\\\":\\\"commonjs\\\"}' --transpile-only tests/FeatureWheelTypes.test.ts\\n * 涵蓋：[testable] BC-1, BC-2, BC-3, BC-4, BC-8 + 純 helper\\n */\\n\\nimport {\\n    FeatureWheelSegmentType,\\n    SegmentDescriptor,\\n    ParseServerWheelData,\\n    WheelDataLayer,\\n    ComputeTargetAngle,\\n    TypeToIconIndex,\\n    NormalizeAngle,\\n    IsKnownSegmentType,\\n    GetDefaultSegments,\\n    FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT,\\n    FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_ANGLE,\\n    FEATURE_WHEEL_EXTRA_CIRCLES,\\n    DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX,\\n} from '../assets/Script/FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes';\\n\\nlet total = 0;\\nlet passed = 0;\\nconst failures: string[] = [];\\n\\nfunction check(name: string, cond: boolean): void {\\n    total++;\\n    if (cond) {\\n        passed++;\\n    } else {\\n        failures.push(name);\\n        console.log(`  ❌ ${name}`);\\n    }\\n}\\n\\nfunction approx(a: number, b: number, eps = 1e-9): boolean {\\n    return Math.abs(a - b) < eps;\\n}\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// BC-1：ParseServerWheelData 對合法 WheelData 回 12 格，server→client type 正確映射（layer 選取）\\n// WheelData 第一層 0=MG 1=FG；第二層 Data = ServerWheelFeature（0 FG,1 Multi,2 Upgrade,3 Transfer,4 Grand,-1 None）\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n{\\n    const raw = [\\n        { Data: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, -1] }, // MG\\n        { Data: [4, 3, 1, 2, 3, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 0] },  // FG\\n    ];\\n    const mg = ParseServerWheelData(raw, WheelDataLayer.MainGame);\\n    check('BC-1 MG：回傳剛好 12 格', mg.length === FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n    check('BC-1 MG：FG(0)→FreeGame', mg[0].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame);\\n    check('BC-1 MG：Multi(1)→Multiplier', mg[1].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier);\\n    check('BC-1 MG：Upgrade(2)→Upgrade', mg[2].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade);\\n    check('BC-1 MG：Transfer(3)→SymbolConvert', mg[3].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert);\\n    check('BC-1 MG：Grand(4)→GrandJP', mg[4].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP);\\n    check('BC-1 MG：None(-1)→None', mg[5].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None);\\n    check('BC-1：移除 value 欄位', (mg[1] as any).value === undefined);\\n\\n    const fg = ParseServerWheelData(raw, WheelDataLayer.FreeGame);\\n    check('BC-1 FG：取第二層', fg[0].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP && fg[11].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame);\\n}\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// BC-2：ParseServerWheelData fallback — 整層無資料回預設 12 格\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n{\\n    const def = GetDefaultSegments();\\n    const isDefault = (a: SegmentDescriptor[]) =>\\n        a.length === FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT && a.every((s, i) => s.type === def[i].type);\\n\\n    check('BC-2 null → 預設 12 格', isDefault(ParseServerWheelData(null, WheelDataLayer.MainGame)));\\n    check('BC-2 undefined → 預設 12 格', isDefault(ParseServerWheelData(undefined, WheelDataLayer.MainGame)));\\n    check('BC-2 空陣列 → 預設 12 格', isDefault(ParseServerWheelData([], WheelDataLayer.MainGame)));\\n    check('BC-2 缺該層 → 預設 12 格', isDefault(ParseServerWheelData([{ Data: [0, 1, 2] }], WheelDataLayer.FreeGame)));\\n    check('BC-2 該層 Data 非陣列 → 預設 12 格', isDefault(ParseServerWheelData([{ Data: null }], WheelDataLayer.MainGame)));\\n    check('BC-2 該層 Data 為空 → 預設 12 格', isDefault(ParseServerWheelData([{ Data: [] }], WheelDataLayer.MainGame)));\\n\\n    // 有資料但長度不足 12 → 缺格補 None（仍 12 格）\\n    const short = ParseServerWheelData([{ Data: [1, 1] }], WheelDataLayer.MainGame);\\n    check('BC-2 不足 12：補 None 且仍 12 格', short.length === FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT && short[11].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.None);\\n    check('BC-2 不足 12：已提供格仍映射', short[0].type === FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier);\\n}\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// BC-3：ComputeTargetAngle 單向單調 + 落點正確（順時針 / 逆時針雙向）\\n// 圈數期望引用常數 FEATURE_WHEEL_EXTRA_CIRCLES，避免硬編碼被調校打破\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n{\\n    const C = FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_ANGLE; // 30（12 格）\\n    const EXTRA = FEATURE_WHEEL_EXTRA_CIRCLES * 360; // 隨常數連動\\n\\n    // 預設（順時針）→ 遞減；逆時針 → 遞增\\n    check('BC-3 CW 預設：land0 from 0 → -EXTRA', approx(ComputeTargetAngle(0, 0), -EXTRA));\\n    check('BC-3 CCW：land0 from 0 → +EXTRA', approx(ComputeTargetAngle(0, 0, false), EXTRA));\\n    check('BC-3 CCW：land3 from 0 → 3C+EXTRA', approx(ComputeTargetAngle(3, 0, false), 3 * C + EXTRA));\\n\\n    for (let land = 0; land < FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT; land++) {\\n        for (const cur of [0, 17, 100, 250, 359]) {\\n            // 順時針（預設）：遞減，落點對齊 base，位移幅度 ∈ [EXTRA, EXTRA+360)\\n            const tcw = ComputeTargetAngle(land, cur);\\n            check(`BC-3 CW 落點：land${land} cur${cur} 對齊 base`, approx(((tcw % 360) + 360) % 360, (land * C) % 360));\\n            check(`BC-3 CW 遞減：land${land} cur${cur} target<current`, tcw < cur);\\n            const dcw = cur - tcw;\\n            check(`BC-3 CW 不變號：land${land} cur${cur} |delta|∈[EXTRA,EXTRA+360)`, dcw >= EXTRA - 1e-9 && dcw < EXTRA + 360 + 1e-9);\\n\\n            // 逆時針：遞增，同落點\\n            const tccw = ComputeTargetAngle(land, cur, false);\\n            check(`BC-3 CCW 落點：land${land} cur${cur} 對齊 base`, approx(((tccw % 360) + 360) % 360, (land * C) % 360));\\n            check(`BC-3 CCW 遞增：land${land} cur${cur} target>current`, tccw > cur);\\n            const dccw = tccw - cur;\\n            check(`BC-3 CCW 不變號：land${land} cur${cur} delta∈[EXTRA,EXTRA+360)`, dccw >= EXTRA - 1e-9 && dccw < EXTRA + 360 + 1e-9);\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// BC-8：連續多次轉動 — 每次同向單調、落點正確、正規化防漂移（雙向）\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n{\\n    const C = FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_ANGLE;\\n    const lands = [3, 7, 0, 9, 5, 5]; // 含重複落點（5→5）\\n\\n    for (const clockwise of [true, false]) {\\n        let cur = 0;\\n        let allMono = true;\\n        let allLand = true;\\n        let allBounded = true;\\n        for (const land of lands) {\\n            const t = ComputeTargetAngle(land, cur, clockwise);\\n            // 順時針應遞減、逆時針應遞增\\n            if (clockwise ? !(t < cur) : !(t > cur)) allMono = false;\\n            if (!approx(((t % 360) + 360) % 360, (land * C) % 360)) allLand = false;\\n            // 模擬轉動結束後正規化（Manager 行為），下次以正規化值起算\\n            cur = NormalizeAngle(t);\\n            if (cur < 0 || cur >= 360) allBounded = false;\\n        }\\n        const dir = clockwise ? 'CW' : 'CCW';\\n        check(`BC-8 連續轉動(${dir})：每次皆同向單調`, allMono);\\n        check(`BC-8 連續轉動(${dir})：每次落點正確（含重複落點）`, allLand);\\n        check(`BC-8 連續轉動(${dir})：正規化後角度恆在 [0,360)（防漂移）`, allBounded);\\n    }\\n}\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// BC-4：TypeToIconIndex — 已知 type 正確、未知 type 回預設\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n{\\n    check('BC-4 已知：SymbolConvert→0', TypeToIconIndex(FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert) === 0);\\n    check('BC-4 已知：Multiplier→1', TypeToIconIndex(FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier) === 1);\\n    check('BC-4 已知：Upgrade→2', TypeToIconIndex(FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade) === 2);\\n    check('BC-4 已知：GrandJP→3', TypeToIconIndex(FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP) === 3);\\n    check('BC-4 已知：FreeGame→4', TypeToIconIndex(FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame) === 4);\\n    check('BC-4 未知：99→預設', TypeToIconIndex(99 as FeatureWheelSegmentType) === DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX);\\n    check('BC-4 未知：-1→預設', TypeToIconIndex(-1 as FeatureWheelSegmentType) === DEFAULT_ICON_INDEX);\\n}\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// 純 helper（支撐上述 BC 的基礎正確性）\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n{\\n    check('helper GetDefaultSegments 回 12 格', GetDefaultSegments().length === FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT);\\n    check('helper NormalizeAngle(-10)=350', approx(NormalizeAngle(-10), 350));\\n    check('helper NormalizeAngle(370)=10', approx(NormalizeAngle(370), 10));\\n    check('helper NormalizeAngle(720)=0', approx(NormalizeAngle(720), 0));\\n    check('helper IsKnownSegmentType(0)=true', IsKnownSegmentType(0) === true);\\n    check('helper IsKnownSegmentType(4)=true', IsKnownSegmentType(4) === true);\\n    check('helper IsKnownSegmentType(99)=false', IsKnownSegmentType(99) === false);\\n}\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// 契約鎖定：client enum 數值必須對齊 server（passthrough 前提）\\n// 若後端改號，本區會變紅 → 提醒改回「保留本地編號 + adapter 加映射層」\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n{\\n    check('契約 None=-1', FeatureWheelSegmentType.None === -1);\\n    check('契約 FreeGame=0', FeatureWheelSegmentType.FreeGame === 0);\\n    check('契約 Multiplier=1', FeatureWheelSegmentType.Multiplier === 1);\\n    check('契約 Upgrade=2', FeatureWheelSegmentType.Upgrade === 2);\\n    check('契約 SymbolConvert(Transfer)=3', FeatureWheelSegmentType.SymbolConvert === 3);\\n    check('契約 GrandJP(Grand)=4', FeatureWheelSegmentType.GrandJP === 4);\\n}\\n\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// 結果\\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────\\nconsole.log(`\\\\nFeatureWheelTypes 測試：${passed}/${total} 通過`);\\nif (failures.length > 0) {\\n    console.log(`失敗清單：\\\\n  - ${failures.join('\\\\n  - ')}`);\\n    process.exitCode = 1;\\n} else {\\n    console.log('✅ 全部通過');\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":14,\"oldLines\":6,\"newStart\":14,\"newLines\":7,\"lines\":[\"     TypeToIconIndex,\",\"     NormalizeAngle,\",\"     IsKnownSegmentType,\",\"+    HasActiveWheel,\",\"     GetDefaultSegments,\",\"     FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT,\",\"     FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_ANGLE,\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

    <fact>Tests validate false cases: single None(-1), double None(-1,-1), null, undefined, and empty arrays</fact>

  <narrative>Completed HasActiveWheel feature implementation by adding comprehensive test coverage. The test suite validates 11 scenarios ensuring the guard function correctly identifies active wheel rounds for FeatureWheelShowState entry decisions. Valid wheel triggers (SymbolConvert=3, FreeGame=0, or any non-None type) return true, while all-None configurations, missing data (null/undefined/empty), and invalid values return false to skip wheel presentation. A critical edge case test confirms FreeGame(0) is properly distinguished from None(-1) despite both being numeric values near zero - the function must check explicit inequality to -1 rather than relying on falsy evaluation. Test descriptions reference actual game data patterns from respin01.json and FreeGame rounds, grounding validation in real server response structures. This completes the feature wheel guard implementation with testable BC-1 behavioral constraint verification.</narrative>

Documentation specifies this state activates after AWARD when plate0 triggers a wheel, then transitions to ROUND_SHOW_END, forming the complete award→wheel→completion flow. This enum addition complements the HasActiveWheel guard function, establishing the state machine infrastructure for conditional wheel演出. The placement strategy follows defensive design principles: extending rather than inserting minimizes regression risk in a system where state enum values may be used numerically (e.g., in switch statements, lookups, or serialization).</narrative>

  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\GameState\\\\FeatureWheelShowState.ts\",\"content\":\"import { _decorator, log } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport GameView from \\\"../GameView\\\";\\nimport { BaseState, eventManager, stateManager } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/Managers\\\";\\nimport Game_Define from \\\"../Game_Define\\\";\\nimport { FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT } from \\\"../FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelManager\\\";\\nimport { FeatureWheelSegmentType, FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT, SpinResult } from \\\"../FeatureWheel/FeatureWheelTypes\\\";\\n\\nconst { ccclass } = _decorator;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch Feature Wheel 轉輪演出 State（骨架 + 轉輪，不含落點後盤面效果）\\n *\\n * 位置：plate0 的 AWARD（對線獎）之後、ROUND_SHOW_END 之前（由 GameView.AfterShowWin 守衛導向）。\\n * 對應規格 3.1 STEP3-5「檢查轉輪 → 觸發轉輪 → 第一次發動」；重轉（STEP6）仍為後續 plate。\\n *\\n * 職責邊界（scope = 骨架+轉輪演出）：\\n *   IN  — SHOW_UI → 依 WheelFeatures 逐項 PLAY_SPIN(SlotIndex) 序列等待 → HIDE_UI → ROUND_SHOW_END\\n *   OUT — 落點後的盤面演出（符號轉 CASH / 乘倍 badge / 升級 / FG 交棒）由後續 plate 停輪或後續階段處理\\n *\\n * 不在此 State 改動狀態機路由：FG（Type=0/4）的實際進場仍走既有 CheckState/LeaveRespin 的 IsGoingToFree。\\n */\\n@ccclass( \\\"FeatureWheelShowState\\\" )\\nexport class FeatureWheelShowState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public async OnEnter()\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"OnEnter State : FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW\\\" );\\n\\n        // 只取「有效」轉輪項（Type≠None）。理論上進到此 State 必有 ≥1（AfterShowWin 已用 HasActiveWheel 守衛），\\n        // 此處再過濾一次防禦：把混在其中的 None 項剔除，避免無意義轉動。\\n        const features = ( this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.WheelFeatures ?? [] )\\n            .filter( w => w != null && w.Type !== FeatureWheelSegmentType.None );\\n\\n        if ( features.length === 0 )\\n        {\\n            // 不應發生（守衛已擋）；fail-loud 但不炸狀態機，直接續流程\\n            console.warn( \\\"[FeatureWheelShowState] 無有效 WheelFeatures，跳過轉輪演出\\\" );\\n            stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI );\\n\\n        // WheelCount 迴圈：逐項「序列等待」——PlaySpin 有 m_isSpinning 重入守衛，\\n        // 未等前一次 callback 就發下一次會被靜默丟棄（FeatureWheelManager 行為，BC-2 硬約束）。\\n        for ( const wf of features )\\n        {\\n            const landIndex = wf.SlotIndex ?? 0;\\n\\n            // 防 hang：PlaySpin 對越界 landIndex 是 warn+return（不呼叫 callback）→ 若 await 會永久掛住。\\n            // 故在 dispatch 前先驗範圍，越界則 fail-loud 跳過該次（不 await）。\\n            if ( landIndex < 0 || landIndex >= FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT )\\n            {\\n                console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] SlotIndex=${landIndex} 越界 0~${FEATURE_WHEEL_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1}，跳過該次轉動` );\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n\\n            const result = await this.PlaySpinOnce( landIndex );\\n\\n            // fail-loud 一致性：落點 type 應與 server WheelFeatures.Type 相符\\n            // （前提 P：server SlotIndex 與客戶端 12 格序一致——待 server 對拍；不符僅 warn 不阻流程）\\n            if ( result != null && result.type !== wf.Type )\\n            {\\n                console.warn( `[FeatureWheelShowState] 落點 type 不一致：landed=${result.type} vs server=${wf.Type}（SlotIndex=${landIndex}）` );\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        eventManager.Dispatch( FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.HIDE_UI );\\n\\n        stateManager.NextState( Game_Define.GameState.ROUND_SHOW_END );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 包一層 Promise 等單次 PLAY_SPIN 完成回調\\n     * @param landIndex 落點格索引（已由呼叫端確認 0~11 範圍）\\n     */\\n    private PlaySpinOnce( landIndex: number ): Promise<SpinResult | null>\\n    {\\n        return new Promise<SpinResult | null>( resolve =>\\n        {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(\\n                FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN,\\n                landIndex,\\n                ( result: SpinResult ) => resolve( result ?? null )\\n            );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n}\\n\"}"</parameters>

This is a significant implementation - a brand new state class for the feature wheel presentation. Let me capture the key aspects:

1. **New file created**: FeatureWheelShowState.ts in GameState folder
2. **Purpose**: Orchestrates the feature wheel presentation sequence between AWARD and ROUND_SHOW_END states
3. **Key behavior**:
   - Filters WheelFeatures for non-None types
   - Sequentially awaits each wheel spin (PLAY_SPIN event)
   - Validates landIndex bounds to prevent hangs
   - Compares result type vs server type for consistency
   - Wraps PLAY_SPIN event dispatch in Promise for async/await
4. **Defensive programming**:
   - Double-filters None types (guard already checked, but defensive)
   - Validates SlotIndex range before dispatching to prevent hang
   - Fail-loud warnings but continues flow rather than crashing
   - Sequential execution prevents BC-2 reentry issues

This is a feature implementation.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Implemented FeatureWheelShowState for Wheel Presentation Flow</title>
  <subtitle>FeatureWheelShowState orchestrates sequential wheel spins between AWARD and ROUND_SHOW_END states.</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>FeatureWheelShowState.ts created in assets/Script/GameState extending BaseState for wheel presentation orchestration</fact>
    <fact>OnEnter filters RoundInfo.WheelFeatures for Type ≠ None, sequentially awaits PLAY_SPIN for each via PlaySpinOnce wrapper</fact>
    <fact>SlotIndex bounds validation (0-11) added before PLAY_SPIN dispatch to prevent permanent hang when Manager rejects out-of-bounds requests</fact>
    <fact>PlaySpinOnce wraps eventManager.Dispatch(FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.PLAY_SPIN) in Promise enabling async/await sequential execution</fact>
    <fact>State validates landed result.type matches server WheelFeatures.Type with fail-loud warning for mismatches</fact>
    <fact>Flow: SHOW_UI → for-each wheel feature PLAY_SPIN sequential await → HIDE_UI → ROUND_SHOW_END transition</fact>
    <fact>Scope boundary documented: handles wheel UI and spins only, excludes post-landing symbol effects (CASH conversion, multiplier badges, upgrades)</fact>
    <fact>Defensive double-filter removes None types despite AfterShowWin guard using HasActiveWheel, preventing mixed-array edge cases</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implemented FeatureWheelShowState as the state machine integration point for feature wheel presentation. The state extends BaseState and slots between AWARD (win line presentation) and ROUND_SHOW_END, activated by AfterShowWin guard checking HasActiveWheel(). OnEnter fetches RoundInfo.WheelFeatures, filters for non-None types defensively (despite guard pre-check), and dispatches FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT.SHOW_UI to reveal the wheel UI. It then iterates WheelFeatures sequentially, awaiting each spin via PlaySpinOnce - a Promise wrapper around PLAY_SPIN event dispatch that resolves on callback. Sequential execution prevents BC-2 reentrancy violations where FeatureWheelManager's m_isSpinning guard would silently reject concurrent spin requests. Critical hang prevention: SlotIndex is validated against 0-11 bounds before dispatch because Manager returns early (no callback) for out-of-bounds indices, causing await to hang indefinitely. After all spins complete, HIDE_UI is dispatched and state transitions to ROUND_SHOW_END. The state validates landed result.type against server WheelFeatures.Type with fail-loud warnings but continues flow (server SlotIndex alignment pending verification). Scope is explicitly limited to wheel UI and spin演出 - post-landing symbol transformations (CASH, multipliers, upgrades, FG transitions) remain with subsequent plates or existing state handlers, preserving existing CheckState/LeaveRespin FG routing logic.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/GameState/FeatureWheelShowState.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

The user has edited GameView.ts to register FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW state in the state machine. This is the final integration step that makes the new state machine node available for use.

<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Registered FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW State in State Machine</title>
  <subtitle>SetStateMachine adds FeatureWheelShowState instance enabling state transitions for wheel presentation flow.</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>GameView.SetStateMachine() now registers Game_Define.GameState.FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW with new FeatureWheelShowState(this) instance</fact>
    <fact>State registration placed after ENTER_RESPIN and LEAVE_RESPIN states, before stateManager.Init() call</fact>
    <fact>HasActiveWheel imported to GameView.ts alongside ParseServerWheelData and WheelDataLayer</fact>
    <fact>State machine initialization now includes 15 total states spanning game flow from WAIT_RES through FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed state machine integration by registering FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW state in GameView.SetStateMachine(). The registration creates a FeatureWheelShowState instance passing GameView as dependency, enabling the state to access game data (RoundInfo.WheelFeatures), dispatch wheel events (FEATURE_WHEEL_EVENT), and transition to ROUND_SHOW_END. The state is registered alongside existing states (AWARD, ROUND_SHOW_END, ENTER_RESPIN, etc.) before stateManager.Init() activates the state graph. HasActiveWheel function imported enables AfterShowWin() guard logic (next step) to conditionally route to FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW only when RoundInfo contains valid wheel features. This completes the infrastructure for wheel presentation flow: enum value (FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW), state class (FeatureWheelShowState.ts), guard function (HasActiveWheel), and state machine registration now in place pending routing logic integration in AfterShowWin.</narrative>

content.thinking:
This is the final piece - the routing logic in AfterShowWin() that makes the feature wheel actually activate in the game flow. Let me create an observation for this critical change.

AfterShowWin() now has conditional routing:
- If CurSubPlateIndex === 0 (first plate/hand in round) AND HasActiveWheel returns true (WheelFeatures has at least one non-None type), it routes to FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW state
- Otherwise, it goes directly to ROUND_SHOW_END as before

This completes the full integration chain.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Integrated Conditional Wheel Routing in AfterShowWin</title>
  <subtitle>AfterShowWin routes to FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW when plate0 triggers active wheel, completing presentation flow integration.</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>AfterShowWin() now checks CurSubPlateIndex===0 AND HasActiveWheel(RoundInfo.WheelFeatures.map(w=>w.Type)) before routing</fact>
    <fact>Conditional logic routes to FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW when both conditions met, otherwise ROUND_SHOW_END as original behavior</fact>
    <fact>plate0 gate ensures wheel演出 only triggers on first hand of round, preventing Respin重轉 sub>0 hands from re-triggering wheel</fact>
    <fact>HasActiveWheel filters WheelFeatures extracting Type fields, returning true only when at least one Type ≠ None (-1)</fact>
    <fact>Comment documents three-way routing outcome: active wheel → FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW → ROUND_SHOW_END; no wheel/Respin sub → direct ROUND_SHOW_END</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed feature wheel presentation flow by implementing conditional routing logic in AfterShowWin(). Previously this method unconditionally transitioned to ROUND_SHOW_END after award display. Now it evaluates two conditions: (1) CurSubPlateIndex===0 confirming first plate/hand in current round, and (2) HasActiveWheel checking if any WheelFeatures.Type ≠ None indicating server-triggered wheel. When both conditions satisfy, game flow routes AWARD → FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW → ROUND_SHOW_END (via FeatureWheelShowState's exit transition). Otherwise maintains original direct AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END path for rounds without wheel or Respin subsequent hands. The plate0 gate prevents wheel re-triggering during Respin連鎖 where sub-plate index increments with each re-spin hand. HasActiveWheel performs defensive filtering mapping WheelFeatures array to Type values, checking for non-None entries using Array.some(). This routing logic completes the full feature chain: enum (FEATURE_WHEEL_SHOW), guard function (HasActiveWheel), state class (FeatureWheelShowState), state registration (SetStateMachine), and now conditional activation (AfterShowWin). The implementation preserves existing game flow for all non-wheel scenarios while enabling seamless wheel演出 insertion when server protocol indicates active features.</narrative>

    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
  </concepts>

  </files_modified>
</observation>
